## What this PR does

Brief summary of the change.

## Why

What problem does it solve, or what does it enable?

## How to verify

Steps to exercise the change locally. For UI changes, include before/
after screenshots or a short screen recording.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (or only pre-existing failures remain)
- [ ] New code has a minimal, focused set of tests if it has logic
      worth testing
- [ ] Touched code follows the conventions in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or personal data in the diff
- [ ] If this adds an AI feature, it calls `callAI()` / `streamAI()` —
      no new server-side AI routes
